name: migration creates override storage
scenario: developer_access_overrides table includes enabled flag, allowed roles, active effective role, TTL, route and mutation capabilities, and constraints
expected_result: table and constraints exist in migration

name: migration creates audit trail
scenario: override selection, denial, expiration, disable, and RPC action events are logged
expected_result: audit table and write helper exist
proof: developerBreakGlassMigration.test.ts plus runtime verifier audit rows

name: server-side effective role validation
scenario: developer_set_effective_role_v1 rejects disabled, expired, and non-allowed roles

name: route access model
scenario: enabled override adds allowed office roles and disabled override is ignored
expected_result: developer can see all allowed role cards, ordinary users remain unchanged

name: developer client RPC wrapper
scenario: client loads override context, sets effective role, and clears effective role through server RPCs
expected_result: client never trusts a local-only effective role

name: director PDF override
scenario: active developer override with director effective role passes director PDF auth

name: office UI style/extraction contract
scenario: dev-only role switcher styles remain explicit in OfficeHub extraction contract

name: runtime buyer/accountant role actions
scenario: temporary override user selects buyer and accountant roles through server RPC
expected_result: allowed contexts pass, non-allowed role is denied, disable returns to base role, audit rows written

name: full regression suite
proof: npx jest --no-coverage: 274 passed, 1 skipped, 1552 tests passed
